name: polymath-connector-cloudflare
description: Cloudflare connector: MCP for zones/DNS/Workers + edge-incident-triage skill that separates origin failure from edge failure from WAF rule.

cloudflareApiToken.title: Cloudflare API token
cloudflareApiToken.description: Scoped API token from Cloudflare → Profile → API Tokens. Avoid Global API Keys.

cloudflareAccountId.title: Cloudflare account ID
cloudflareAccountId.description: Account ID (hex). Required for account-scoped APIs (Workers, R2, Pages).
